title: helichrysum stoechas subsp. rupicola
intro: Helichrysum stoechas subsp. rupicola, commonly known as a shrubby variety of the Helichrysum stoechas, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family and native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Helichrysum stoechas subsp. rupicola include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and essential oils, which are often used in aromatherapy and traditional medicine to promote relaxation and well-being.
